title: No Locator Bar
description: Removes the Locator Bar from the game completely.
body:
![NOLOCATORBAR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea70b732ad43ee9a6ce827de99a63c8f8a6d7a4d.png)
![Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Minecraft-1.21.6+-blue?style=flat-square) Simply replaces the locator bar with the XP bar.
If you want per-player configuration, check out my other Locator Bar plugin [here](https://modrinth.com/plugin/locator-bar). ![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80d9889ca71586c3e9645fada8412e940cb70196.png)
